report.summary: Day 62 publish shipped (2 pages promoted to 414 total); 2 TS errors flagged in non-critical files; build OOM in local VM but Vercel config healthy; /defi-yields API route missing fallback data is highest-priority fix.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 414 published slugs, 1084 page.tsx files — 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (expected: international/future pages queued ahead of scaffold)
TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files — structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file, documentation-only) and learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped < > in JSX at lines 531/533)
Build: Bus error (OOM) in local VM sandbox — not indicative of Vercel production; next.config has ignoreBuildErrors:true + 8GB NODE_OPTIONS + staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4
Latest commit (e999560): published 2 pages (Day 62) — only touched published-pages.ts, low regression risk
Publish queue: 2 pages remaining (ecosystem/initia, learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026) queued for Day 64
Live site verification blocked — egress proxy prevents HTTP checks from this environment

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko markets, 60s TTL, 2-tier fallback, X-Cache-Source headers OK
/api/trending — CoinGecko trending, 300s TTL, 1-tier fallback only, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, 1-tier fallback only, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + fear-greed, 60s TTL, mock fallback data OK, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (inconsistent)
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, best 3-tier fallback, X-Cache-Source correct
CRITICAL: /api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via lib, 300s TTL, NO fallback data — returns 500 on failure
No rate limiting on any of the 6 public API routes — abuse risk

sections.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items: Latest deploy: commit e999560 (Day 62 publish) — changes only published-pages.ts, minimal risk
next.config: standalone output, trailingSlash, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, ignoreBuildErrors:true — all correct for 826+ page site
Middleware: 127 lines, PILLAR_PAGES hardcoded (Edge Runtime constraint), security headers present
Cache strategy: pillar pages 1hr browser/1d CDN/7d stale, other pages 30min/12hr/1d — appropriate
No vercel.json present — all config via next.config.ts and dashboard (normal)
Could not verify live deployment status — egress proxy blocks degen0x.com from this environment

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Day 62 publish — 2 pages promoted (118 lines added to published-pages.ts, net +2 pages to 414 total)
Carry-over: Fix unescaped JSX in crypto-index-funds-guide page.tsx (lines 531/533), add fallback data to /api/defi-yields, add X-Cache-Source headers to trending + fear-greed routes
Carry-over (low priority): Rename structured-data.examples.ts to .tsx or exclude from tsconfig
Queue status: 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE for Day 64 (ecosystem/initia, learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026)
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention — all items are engineering carry-over
